production.playableLoop: Load the fixed cinematic camera, allow the lighting stack to settle, and capture the composed derelict interior for visual inspection.
controls: Fixed cinematic camera; no gameplay input is required.

lookProfile.camera: fixed eye-height perspective across the window shafts

production.objective: Prove baked GI, SSGI, cascaded shadows, contact shadows, bloom, height fog, god rays, and rough PBR materials in one deterministic scene.
production.progression: Runtime readiness followed by a settled before/after screenshot pair on web and desktop.
production.failRetry: A failed readiness or diagnostic assertion is retried by rerunning the committed hero-interior playtest scenario.
feedbackMoments: Two near-white framed windows bloom against the dark room.
Diagonal shafts cross the camera view and fade into warm dust haze.
Warm bounced light reveals the opposite wall without flattening the corners.
The yellow accent crate, fallen door, bed, cabinets, crates, and debris remain grounded by contact shadows.

assetPlan.playerHero: Not applicable: this is a static renderer showcase with a fixed camera.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Not applicable: architecture and set dressing are the visual subjects.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: The saturated yellow crate is the direct-light accent and visual focal prop.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Intentional source-owned procedural architecture and set dressing provide deterministic adapter-parity evidence.
assetPlan.uiHud: No HUD is rendered so lighting evidence remains unobstructed.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Not applicable to a static lighting proof.

highValueSurfaces.summary: A fully enclosed ten-by-four-by-eight metre derelict room with two true window openings, frames, mullions, a doorway, and a lit secondary corridor.
A rusted bed frame, cabinets, wooden crates, fallen door, yellow accent crate, pipes, puddles, and debris provide authored scale cues and shadow contacts.
Portable environment data owns the warm directional key, baked probe, low ambient, fog, god rays, ACES response, and stabilized cascaded shadows.
The showcase deliberately renders no HUD or starter Ready label.

uiStates.expectation: No retained UI nodes obscure the hero-interior capture.

assetSourcing: Architecture and simple set dressing use intentional source-owned procedural meshes for deterministic web/native parity; no player, enemy, or animated hero asset is required.
